name: Bell of Truth
descs: Inflict 1 [Vulnerable] this turn to enemies affected by [Vibration] Burst. (Activates once per Attack Skill that triggers [VibrationExplosion])
Inflict 1 [Vulnerable] <style="upgradeHighlight">this turn and next turn</style> to enemies affected by [Vibration] Burst. (Activates once per Attack Skill that triggers [VibrationExplosion])
<style="upgradeHighlight">Inflict 2 [Vulnerable]</style> this turn and next turn to enemies affected by [VibrationExplosion]. (Activates once per Attack Skill that triggers [VibrationExplosion])
